x-enumeration-literals.name: CounterUndertakingRequestForLocalUndertaking
x-enumeration-literals.description: Counter-undertaking issued to a correspondent with a request to issue a local undertaking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CounterUndertakingRequestForCounterUndertaking
x-enumeration-literals.description: Counter-undertaking issued to a correspondent with a request to issue another counter-undertaking.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UndertakingIssuedDirect
x-enumeration-literals.description: Undertaking issued direct to the beneficiary.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UndertakingIssuedViaConfirmingParty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Undertaking issued to the beneficiary via a confirming party.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UndertakingViaAdvisingParty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Undertaking issued to the beneficiary via an advising party.
